event_description: Attacker initiates spear-phishing campaign by sending spoofed email from alison@m57.biz to CFO Jean Jones, utilizing a malicious Return-Path (simsong@xy.dreamhostps.com) to bypass standard filters.
CFO Jean Jones receives the spoofed email and, believing it to be a legitimate request from the President, prepares the requested confidential employee data.
Confidential file containing SSNs and salaries is created on the victim's Desktop shortly before exfiltration.
Attacker manipulates the Reply-To header to redirect the response to an external Gmail account (tuckergorge@gmail.com), ensuring the exfiltrated data bypasses corporate monitoring.
CFO Jean Jones sends the confidential file to the attacker, completing the exfiltration process.
Attacker confirms receipt of data; subsequent investigation reveals anti-forensic activity including deletion of system binaries and use of fake Microsoft prompts.
